title: The Arcane Archive
storySnippet: Hidden behind a secret door, the Arcane Archive contains words so tricky that many adventurers have turned back in defeat.

data.sentenceContext: The northern lights are a natural phenomenon that attracts tourists from around the world.
The school cafeteria was expanded to accommodate the growing number of students.
Doctors inoculate children against dangerous diseases to keep communities healthy.
The science lab was lit by long fluorescent lights that hummed softly overhead.
The lieutenant gave orders to the platoon before they began their training exercise.
Some people considered it sacrilegious to build a shopping mall next to the historic church.
The new safety regulations will supersede all previous guidelines starting next month.
The mischievous kitten knocked over a vase while chasing a butterfly through the living room.
